name: python3-ssdeep
title: python3-ssdeep
summary: Python 3.x wrapper for the ssdeep piecewise hashing tool
description:
Python 3.x wrapper for the ssdeep piecewise hashing tool
This is a straightforward Python wrapper for ssdeep by Jesse Kornblum,
which is a library for computing context triggered piecewise hashes (CTPH).
Also called fuzzy hashes, CTPH can match inputs that have homologies.
Such inputs have sequences of identical bytes in the same order, although
bytes in between these sequences may be different in both content and length.
.
This package contains the extension built for Python 3.x.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-ssdeep because Python 3.x wrapper for the ssdeep piecewise hashing tool.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-ssdeep as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-ssdeep with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-ssdeep --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
